mapper.select: /* statMgmtMapper.getInvPymDataListExcel */ SELECT REGST_ID , TRGT_YM , STRT_YM , END_YM , STRT_YM || '~' || END_YM AS BILL_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , OPEN_DT , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0032', PPPO) AS PPPO , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , RATE_NM , INV_AMNT , PYM_AMNT , UNPD_AMNT , UNPD_RATIO || '%' AS UNPD_RATIO , UNPD_YN , COL_001, COL_002, COL_003, COL_004, COL_005, COL_006, COL_007, COL_008, COL_009, COL_010 , COL_011, COL_012, COL_013, COL_014, COL_015, COL_016, COL_017, COL_018, COL_019, COL_020 , COL_021, COL_022, COL_023, COL_024, COL_025, COL_026, COL_027, COL_028, COL_029, COL_030 , COL_031, COL_032, COL_033, COL_034, COL_035, COL_036, COL_037, COL_038, COL_039, COL_040 , COL_041, COL_042, COL_043, COL_044, COL_045, COL_046, COL_047, COL_048, COL_049, COL_050 , COL_051, COL_052, COL_053, COL_054, COL_055, COL_056, COL_057, COL_058, COL_059, COL_060 , COL_061, COL_062, COL_063, COL_064, COL_065, COL_066, COL_067, COL_068, COL_069, COL_070 , COL_071, COL_072, COL_073, COL_074, COL_075, COL_076, COL_077, COL_078, COL_079, COL_080 , COL_081, COL_082, COL_083, COL_084, COL_085, COL_086, COL_087, COL_088, COL_089, COL_090 , COL_091, COL_092, COL_093, COL_094, COL_095, COL_096, COL_097, COL_098, COL_099, COL_100 , COL_101, COL_102, COL_103, COL_104, COL_105, COL_106, COL_107, COL_108, COL_109, COL_110 , COL_111, COL_112, COL_113, COL_114, COL_115, COL_116, COL_117, COL_118, COL_119, COL_120 FROM TMP_INV_PYM_DATA WHERE REGST_ID = #{sessionUserId} AND TRGT_YM = #{trgtYm} AND STRT_YM = #{strtYm} AND END_YM = #{endYm}
SELECT MBLPHN_NUM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{userId}
mapper.sql: SELECT A.BILL_YM as billYm ,A.FILE_NM as newFileNm ,A.BILL_ITEM_CD as billCd , A.ITEM_NM as itemNm , A.I_PYMN_PYM AS iPymnPym , A.I_PYMN_BCK AS iPymnBck , A.I_PYMN_ADJ AS iPymnAdj , A.I_PYMN_ADJR AS iPymnAdjr , A.I_PYMN_INV AS iPymnInv , A.I_PYMN_RFN AS iPymnRfn , A.I_PYMN_RFNR AS iPymnRfnr , A.I_VAT AS iVat , A.B_PYMN_PYM AS bPymnPym , A.B_PYMN_BCK AS bPymnBck , A.B_PYMN_ADJ AS bPymnAdj , A.B_PYMN_ADJR AS bPymnAdjr , A.B_PYMN_INV AS bPymnInv , A.B_VAT AS bVat , A.I_PYMN_PYM_VAT AS iPymnPymVat , A.I_PYMN_BCK_VAT AS iPymnBckVat , A.I_PYMN_ADJ_VAT AS iPymnAdjVat , A.I_PYMN_ADJR_VAT AS iPymnAdjrVat , A.I_PYMN_INV_VAT AS iPymnInvVat , A.I_PYMN_RFN_VAT AS iPymnRfnVat , A.I_PYMN_RFNR_VAT AS iPymnRfnrVat , A.I_VAT AS iVat , A.B_PYMN_PYM_VAT AS bPymnPymVat , A.B_PYMN_BCK_VAT AS bPymnBckVat , A.B_PYMN_ADJ_VAT AS bPymnAdjVat , A.B_PYMN_ADJR_VAT AS bPymnAdjrVat , A.B_PYMN_INV_VAT AS bPymnInvVat , A.B_VAT AS bVat , A.I_AD_PYM AS iAdPym , A.I_AD_PYM_VAT AS iAdPymVat , A.I_AD_BCK AS iAdBck , A.I_AD_BCK_VAT AS iAdBckVat , A.I_AD_RFN AS iAdRfn , A.I_AD_RFN_VAT AS iAdRfnVat , A.I_AD_RFNR AS iAdRfnr , A.I_AD_RFNR_VAT AS iAdRfnrVat , A.B_AD_PYM AS bAdPym , A.B_AD_PYM_VAT AS bAdPymVat , A.B_AD_BCK AS bAdBck , A.B_AD_BCK_VAT AS bAdBckVat FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_CTTT A WHERE A.BILL_YM = #{stdrDt} ORDER by A.BILL_ITEM_CD
